title: onosmodium strigosum
intro: Onosmodium strigosum, also known as Downy Onos, is a perennial plant species in the borage family (Boraginaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Onosmodium strigosum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
